title: boschia mansonii
intro: Boschia mansonii, also known as the 'karee' or 'curry tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a small to medium-sized tree or shrub native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, and is often used to treat a variety of health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Boschia mansonii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
